scope: When a release has a track with depends_on, the scheduler places the dependent track in a later topological phase; the dependency auto-merges to release-wt via MergeTrackFn in finishTrack before the phase barrier releases, so the dependent track's worktree branches from the post-merge release-wt tip.

reachability.evidence: go test ./internal/scheduler/... -v -run TestDependentTrack exits 0 — 5/5 subtests pass. AC5 integration test (TestDependentTrack_WorktreeBranchesFromMergedTip) sets up a real bare git repo, simulates a dependency track merge into release-wt, creates a dependent worktree, and asserts the dependency's file is present.

delivered.item: AC1: Topological phase ordering via BuildPlan (Kahn's algorithm) + phase barrier in RunParallel (wg.Wait per phase)
AC2: Dependent track worktree branches from live release-wt HEAD (post-dependency tip)
AC3: Auto-merge via MergeTrackFn in finishTrack before track goroutine returns
AC4: Dependency track FAIL cancels dependents via failCancel; dependent tracks in later phases skipped
AC5: Two-track integration scenario over real git repo asserts dependent worktree branches from post-dependency tip
ProductionMergeTrack: local-merge-first, fetch+merge fallback, .git guard for test-only temp dirs
Design review Pin 1: dropped waitForDependencies; phase barrier is the ordering mechanism
Design review Pin 2: S05 gate bypass documentation in finishTrack
